'''Wadewarn''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Talon Karrde]] on [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]]. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] he was present at the evening meal with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] which was interrupted by the arrival of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Behind the scenes==
Wadewarn was named by author [[Timothy Zahn]] after Wade Warren, a fan.<ref name="HTTE20">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
